description: You are the City Clerk for the City of Meridian. Draft a resolution for next Tuesday's City Council meeting to authorize a construction contract using the details from /home/ga/Documents/contract_data.json and the formatting rules from /home/ga/Documents/style_guide.txt. The resolution must include a title and subject, at least three 'WHEREAS' clauses describing the project need, a 'NOW, THEREFORE' enactment clause, body sections authorizing the City Manager to sign with the contractor for the amount and budget account specified in the contract data, and a signature block for the Mayor and City Clerk. The document must feature formal line numbering at an interval of every 5 lines. Save the final resolution as /home/ga/Documents/Resolution_2025_042.odt.
